Subject: RE: 
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
All,
I wanted to follow up with a few points from Minister Doughty. The first is: “a huge 
thank you to the teams doing such crucial work on this”.
The second is his views on our approach, which the Minister has also shared 
directly with the FS. Sharing here for completeness:
Finally, Minister Doughty remains happy to put in any additional calls / support 
lobbying as the situation develops.
 | Private Secretary to the Minister of State for Europe, North 
America and UK Overseas Territories, Stephen Doughty MP
Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office | 
 | King Charles Street

Subject: RE: 
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Thanks Ailsa, all
Some initial reactions to questions raised below:
Timing
 morning 1000EST/1500 GMT. The vote should take place 
in the first hour or so, with action on the 
. Exact timing will depend on speakers before and after 
the vote. And there’s scope for procedural wrangles (eg US asking to go first, or 
claiming the vote is void if the UNSC has acted; oral amendments from the floor; no 
action motions). We’ll keep you posted on the scenarios and will need instructions by 
1500 GMT including on potential EOVs.
The US have asked for the UNSC vote at 0900 EST (1400 GMT) on Monday. 
***
***
***
***
Same copy list as above
247


Finally, we will need to decide today on whether 
 tomorrow to 
be in the GA and Council tomorrow.
James
James Kariuki
Ambassador and Deputy Permanent Representative
UK Mission to the United Nations in New York
One Dag Hammarskjold Plaza l 885 2nd Avenue l New York, NY 10017

 can I have consolidated advice from the Foreign Secretary as 
soon as possible, including input from BE Washington, in time to ensure the PM can 
consider well before the vote/s happen.
Ailsa
Ailsa Terry CMG| Private Secretary for Foreign Affairs| Prime Minister’ s Office 
| 10 Downing Street, London, SW1A 2AA |

ek

We will update further through the weekend, but to flag now that we will need instructions and
a cleared EOV by 0800 NY time on Monday. ene

COMMS / HANDLING

UN press are aware and starting to report the US initiative. Reuters filed with the headline:

“ US proposes rival UN action on Ukraine, pitting it against Europe’ . On current trajectory — if
the US go ahead with their resolutions as drafted, and Ukraine too — is likely to be the
framing of media reporting out of Monday: whether the ‘ world’ is‘ siding’ with the Ukrainian or
the US vision of peace.

eee

Happy to discuss.
Fergus

perms Pocersley | Political Coordinator and Minister Counsellor | UK Mission to the UN |
ersonal

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
